description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single job called prometheus-check running in the default test stage. The job uses the default Docker image and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir -p roles/prometheus, mv $(ls --ignore roles) roles/prometheus/, cp roles/prometheus/tests/test.yml test.yml, cp roles/prometheus/tests/inventory inventory, ansible-playbook --syntax-check -i inventory test.yml --list-tasks, and ansible-playbook -i inventory test.yml --list-tasks. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured for this job. The pipeline is intended to perform Ansible syntax checking and task listing for the Prometheus role.
